    13. THE ULTIMATE IG
</h2>

<div class="lecture-text-container">
<p></p><h1><strong>INTRODUCTION</strong></h1><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">A pretty girl I know, with 35k followers and a phone full of selfies... Asked ME (a guy who "posts quotes" and has 30k fewer followers than her)... This question -- before we all went into quarantine:</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">"How do I make my Instagram kick ass more?"</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">As you probably know, if you live in LA... Deep down... what she's really trying to figure out (and ain't gonna get from me) is:</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">"How do I get Instagram famous?"</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">I get it. It's hard not to focus on vanity metrics. After all, that's how we judge everyone else, right?</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">But that's the very mindset that's murdering us.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">If you're fortunate to work in a creative field, you do know there's a different way of looking at social media, right?</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">One that's tailor-made for you?</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">One that doesn't have negative side-effects like IG has for everyone else?</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">And, dare I say... A way of growing your brand or community that's playful and fun.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">It's based on the timeless concept of "preeminence". (Big word I know, but gorgeous concept...)</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Here's the first thing you do (the easy part):</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">You stop looking at Instagram like it's the place you go to "kill time"... </span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">And you start looking at it in a controversial new way.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Like it's a tool.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">That's what it must become if you're on a journey to creative freedom...</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Now, hang with me here. I ain't going down the road of: "post more often", "post at specific times", "create value", or "make great content". Don't worry.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">I'm hoping for a more scenic journey than that.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">If you'll allow me to feed your old ideas to the tigers... I'd like to suggest a less humiliating way of approaching IG.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">A way that will make you smile instead when you open the app on your phone.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">But let's review something you keep forgetting:</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">There are "influencers" with 100k+ followers whose social media presence has zero impact on the world.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">And there are superstars with 5k followers whose social media presence has a profound effect on their community.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Most creatives I know would "settle" for the second option if they had to pick one.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Now ask yourself... If you stopped posting on Instagram tomorrow... How many people would come to your Instagram funeral?</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Well, THAT'S how many followers you really have.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">If you never thought about it that way... Let that new reality sink in for a minute.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">But then, go even further with the thought.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Ask yourself a few more follow up questions:</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">What if you decided to build an Instagram strategy based ONLY on those people?</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">How would your content change?</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Would you lose followers?</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Or would this new strategy attract even more people like the ones who already love you?</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">But the most important question of them all... How would your mental health improve?</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">If you're tired of chasing the dragon, I'd like to pose a challenge.</span></p><p>Create what I call "The Ultimate IG".</p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Try to design this new kind of Instagram for yourself.</span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><font>It's based on</font></span><font> </font><a href="http://abraham-pop.s3.amazonaws.com/maven_trilogy_teleseminar/StrategyOfPreeminence.pdf" target="_blank"><font>The Strategy Of Preeminence</font></a><font> (yes, this is an age-old concept).</font></p><p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">It's what I've been using with everyone I've worked with over the past 5 years.</span></p><p></p>
</div>

<p></p><h1><strong>10 STEPS TO THE ULTIMATE IG</strong></h1><p>What follows is a guide to building the Ultimate IG. This is always my starting point when I'm wroking with new brands or artists. </p><p>After you go through the Ultimate IG process, you will know what to do with your IG and why you're doing it.</p><p>Too many creatives are using Instagram aimlessly.</p><p>I created this module to make that a thing of the past.</p><p>Don't worry, this "work" is fun. As you think about and answer the questions, you immediately start to visualize an Instagram for yourself that is way more kick-ass than when you had no plan or focus.</p><p><em>Let's get started...</em></p><p><strong><em>PLEASE DOWNLOAD AND USE THE ACCOMPANYING WORKSHEET HERE:</em></strong></p><p></p>
</div>

  <!-- DEBUG: attachment.id=30838424, kind=text -->
  <div class="lecture-attachment lecture-attachment-type-text" id="lecture-attachment-30838424">
    <div class="attachment-data"></div>

<div class="lecture-text-container">
<p></p><p><br></p><h1><strong style="color: inherit;">1. DEFINE PERFORMANCE GOALS</strong></h1><p>1. DEFINE YOUR OVERALL GOAL: Get more email sign-ups? (THIS IS USUALLY THE BEST ONE) Get people to go to your website? Get people to buy something direct?</p><p>2. FOLLOWER GOAL: How many followers are we trying to get? In how much time? HOW are we getting them? Is this even important? </p><p>3. COMMENT GOAL: How many comments are we trying to get on each post? Is this important? What KPIs will we track for this? What will we do/try to encourage commenting?</p><p>4. What KPIs will we use to track these goals? Also track exponential KPIs: SHARES and SAVES.</p><p><br></p><h1><strong>2. DEFINE YOUR "AVATAR"</strong></h1><p>An avatar is a description of the person you imagine to be your brand's biggest fan.</p><p>It can't be "everybody". It needs to be the people who you imagine would be your "day 1s".</p><p>You need to define what types of people your "day 1s" are. Because once you do... You'll only be talking to them.</p><p><strong>ANSWER THESE QUESTIONS:</strong></p><p>1. DEMOGRAPHIC (WHAT IS THEIR AGE, GENDER, NATIONALITY etc...)</p><p>2. GEOGRAPHIC (WHERE ARE THEY FROM? WHERE DO THEY HANG OUT?)</p><p>3. PSYCHOGRAPHIC (WHAT ARE THEY INTERESTED IN? WHAT DO THEY STAND FOR?)</p><p>4. IDENTITY (DO THEY HAVE A WAY OF IDENTIFYING THEMSELVES IE. Punk, Nurse, X'O, Feminist) </p><p>What content could you make that your day 1s would want to share with their friends? Don't gloss over this question. Really think about this.</p><p>How can you provide this sort of content to them?</p><p>Give your avatar a name. It could even be the name of someone you already know who is pretty much your avatar.</p><p>It may be up to two people (IE. a boy and a girl)</p><p>Find a picture that resembles them.</p><p>From this point forward, understand that everything you do on instagram will be for them. Which means that everyone else... just may not get it. And guess what? That's okay. They'll get it later.</p><p><br></p><h1><strong>3. FIGURE OUT WHO'S YOUR COMPETITION</strong></h1><p>LIST 5 CLOSE INSPIRING "COMPETITORS" FOR YOU TO WATCH.</p><p>The best people to pick are people that are similar to you, but ahead of you in the journey of "success".</p><p><br></p><h1><strong>4. LIST WHO HAS INSPIRING INSTAGRAMS IN YOUR NICHE THAT YOU CAN LEARN FROM?</strong></h1><p>NAME 5</p><p>FOLLOW ALL YOUR COMPETITORS AND INSPIRATIONS</p><p>UNFOLLOW EVERYONE THAT ISN'T CONNECTED TO WHAT YOU ARE DOING.</p><p><br></p><h1><strong>5. THE SIMON SINEK EXERCISE</strong></h1><p><strong>Define Your "WHAT?" </strong></p><p>Every brand knows WHAT they do and can clearly articulate what they're all about. Can you? Write it down.</p><p><strong>Define Your "HOW?"</strong></p><p>What makes you different from the rest? How do you SHOW how good you are without having to even open your mouth? Write it down now. </p><p><strong>Define Your "WHY?"</strong></p><p>Ah... The big one.</p><p>What is your worldview? What is the reason you do what you do? The reason anyone should care. Write it down.</p><p><br></p><h2><strong>NOW when you communicate... Reverse It!</strong></h2><p>From now on every time you communicate on Instagram, you will be leading with your "WHY?" </p><p>You will only talk about the other things after you've talked about your WHY?</p><p>For example. With lastnightsparty, I'd never talk about the fact that I take pictures. I'd lead with:</p><p>"I think everyone can look like a superstar. I think people should get out of their comfort zone and talk to strangers more."</p><p>And then I'd let the work speak for itself. I'd never talk about lenses, or how I'm a photographer. I'd talk about "WHY" I do what I do.</p><p>Get it?</p><p>Now, your turn. Re-imagine your Instagram as a place where you talk about your why. I don't need to hear about your new album, your new drawings, your new book or whatever...</p><p>I wanna know about WHY you created them.</p><p>That's what will attract your DAY 1s.</p><p><br></p><h1><strong>6. KILLER BIO</strong></h1><p>Put your WHY in your bio.</p><p>And remember the "HOW" from above? You can put that in there too.</p><p>Make it clear who you are. </p><p>Sometimes you should consider making the first line in your bio whatever your greatest accomplishment is.</p><p>Add your viral #hashtag if you have one.</p><p>Add a call-to-action related to your IG Goal (Remember that one from above?)</p><ul>
<li>link to your email list?</li>
<li>link to a product?</li>
<li>link to your website?</li>
<li>link to your Soundcloud?</li>
</ul><p><br></p><h1><strong>7. BROADCAST MESSAGES + CAPTIONS</strong></h1><p>Let's start defining what you'll be talking about on your IG.</p><p>Your IG is a job. And the people that follow you will be following you because you give them something that they can count on every time.</p><p>You have to define what your messages on your IG will be.</p><p>These are called BROADCAST MESSAGES.</p><p>What do Gary V, Kim Kardashian, Nike and National Geographic have in common?</p><p>They're consistent about what they talk about when they communicate with you.</p><p>They're always on message.</p><p>They each have maximum 3 talking points and they just hammer it home all day.</p><p>And if you follow them... It's cause you love what they're hammering home.</p><p><strong>What are the 3 broadcast messages that YOU will be choosing to "hammer home" on social media every day? </strong></p><p>#### Pick 3.</p><p>Make them related to your "WHY?" your "HOW?".</p><p>Ignore the "WHAT?".</p><p>That should be obvious. </p><p>Everyone's instagram is talking about their "WHAT" (what they do).</p><p>You'll automatically stand out by not doing that too.</p><p><strong>Choose hashtags that go with each message.</strong></p><p><strong>BONUS: What do you believe in that you wish you could say, but is way too controversial? Hint. That's what you should say.</strong></p><p><br></p><h1><strong>8. PICK YOUR CONTENT TYPES</strong></h1><p>Pick 2 content types that would be perfect for your broadcast messages. One of them should be 80% of what you do on your Instagram page. Don't try to do all of them. Your page will be a message. People like following accounts that do one thing well.</p><p>Your goal here is to create content that people would share or save. Forget "LIKES".</p><p>Write them down.</p><p><strong>CAROUSELS?</strong></p><ul>
<li>STORYTELLING</li>
<li>INFORMATIVE</li>
<li>PHOTO GALLERIES</li>
</ul><p><strong>QUOTES?</strong></p><p><strong>SELFIES?</strong></p><p><strong>IG STORY?</strong></p><ul>
<li>POLLS? QUESTIONS?</li>
<li>ANNOUNCEMENTS?</li>
<li>TIKTOKS?</li>
</ul><p><strong>VIDEO?</strong></p><ul>
<li>IGTV?</li>
<li>STRAIGHT TO CAMERA TALKING?</li>
</ul><h2><strong>AND WHAT WILL YOUR CAPTIONS BE LIKE?</strong></h2><p>What is the best caption that will give value to your audience and spread your kind of message?</p><p>LONG CAPTION?</p><p>STORY CAPTION?</p><p>QUOTE CAPTION?</p><p>MINIMAL CAPTION?</p><p>Write it down.</p><p><strong>WHAT WILL YOUR POST FREQUENCY BE?</strong></p><p>ONCE A WEEK?</p><p>THREE TIMES A WEEK?</p><p>ONCE A DAY?</p><p>MULTIPLE TIMES A DAY?</p><p>Write it down.</p><p><br></p><h1><strong>9. CREATE YOUR GRID</strong></h1><p>MAKE AN INSTAGRAM MOCKFEED.</p><p>Use one of the millions of tools out there (I use Later.com) so that you can build what your IG will look like aesthetically in advance.</p><p>Leave nothing to chance.</p><p>*If you can't see it in your head, you won't get there as quickly.*</p><p><br></p><h1><strong>10. START A SIMPLE SPREADSHEET WHERE YOU WILL WRITE YOUR KPIs ONCE A WEEK</strong></h1><p><strong>THINGS YOU MAY BE TRACKING:</strong></p><p>Followers</p><p>Amount of shares</p><p>Amount of engagement</p><p>How many people joined your email list</p><p>How many DMs you got about something related to your business</p><p>How many products you sold</p><p>==</p><p>The key is to pick ONLY ONE.</p><p>Make that your focus.</p><p>And switch around your content until you see those KPIs improving.</p><p>But stay on message.</p><p>It takes a while to establish a new message online.</p><p>The worst thing you can do is dilute it with competing messages like a random selfie, or a random rant about whatever.</p><p>Your audience wants to find you.</p><p>Make it easy for them.</p><p>That's the only reason to build your ULTIMATE IG.</p><p></p>
</div>
